brand.name: KLM Blue
brand.description: Our main brand colour and very recognisable as KLM. Used for logo and other branding assets such as illustrations.
brand.use_case: Only use for branding purposes, the KLM logo and visuals.

primary.name: Primary 100
primary.description: Lighter shades are mostly used for background elements.

primary.name: Primary 300
primary.description: Lighter shades are mostly used for background elements.

primary.name: Primary 500
primary.description: Starts at the Primary 500 shade for foreground purposes with sufficient contrast.

primary.name: Primary 800
primary.description: Darker blue for specific UI elements.
primary.use_case: Used for subtitles and non-primary actions

accent.name: Accent 500
accent.description: Used only for accents and extra indications. Should be used with care as it doesn't provide enough contrast for text backgrounds.

grey.name: Grey 700
grey.use_case: Used for tertiary text and caption

blue.name: Blue 100
blue.use_case: Generally used across informative states, as a background color. NOT similar to our Primary colors.

blue.name: Blue 300
blue.use_case: Generally used across informative states, as a border color. NOT similar to our Primary colors.

blue.name: Blue 500
blue.use_case: Generally used across informative states, as a fill color for icons. NOT similar to our Primary colors.
